Scholarly Record

Publications, Intellectual Property & Presentations

The complete scholarly record of Derek F. Amanatullah, M.D., Ph.D., Associate Professor of Orthopaedic Surgery at Stanford University. Linked profiles below provide indexed access to every available article.

Stanford Profile ORCID Google Scholar PubMed
